stages.task: Extract ProductHunt launch: founder name, email pattern, product URL, description, category, upvotes, top comments
Reverse lookup: LinkedIn search, email permutation testing, company domain, Twitter handle
Generate 3 email variants: (1) founder/CEO intro, (2) partnership opportunity, (3) feature request/integration angle. Include personalization hooks from PH comments.
Wire into Instantly or custom cold email script. Queue with 2-day stagger between variants. Tag as PH_LAUNCH_2026_MAR.
Route to engagement_bait_converter.py. Generate posts: launch announcement, feature breakdown, comparison to existing tools (if any), early-bird angle, founder story angle.
